Vendored package: substrate-ui (generated bundle — do not edit by hand)

Source: this repository (packages/ui door + packages/tokens compiled CSS)
Contents: ESM bundle registering the sub-* custom elements (Lit bundled in)
and the --sub-* custom-property stylesheet.

Rebuild procedure: from the workspace root run
  pnpm -F @substrate/tokens build && node tools/build-misfits-vendor.mjs
then review the diff and commit. CI rebuilds and fails on any drift, and
tools/selfcheck.py verifies these hashes.

Files:
    substrate-ui.js sha256 b6e98dd4162a7d27f71996c96e7d4ae4f047960db2c36366dd6da81539d4fa34
    substrate-ui.css sha256 ad01dc45ae670f545ec3544477589e6872bb1dbee57775a988511d5f1986461d
    LICENSE sha256 90b3938aa020eeee83a1f206c223e298825c229098273f9d078500b782736ea4
